item.title: WATCH: Meet Punch the monkey
item.description: "GMA" looks at why the internet is obsessed with Punch, the baby monkey who went viral with his plushie.

item.title: Savannah Guthrie announces new reward for Nancy Guthrie: 'Somebody knows'
item.description: "Today" show host Savannah Guthrie announced on Tuesday a new $1 million reward for the recovery of her mom, Nancy Guthrie, who has been missing since...

item.title: State of the Union: Trump expected to tout achievements ahead of midterms
item.description: The president will make his case to Americans amid growing controversy over his domestic and foreign policies.

item.title: WATCH: Four years in, Ukrainian soldier reflects on cost of war
item.description: ABC News visits Roman, a firefighter-turned soldier, to see the toll it has taken on him, his family and his country.

item.title: WATCH: The story behind 'Front Porch Freestyles'
item.description: The YouTube hit transforms front porches into stages for emerging artists and music stars alike.
